headline: Claude 4 just dropped.
sub: The best model Anthropic has ever shipped. Heres what nobody is talking about.

headline: Coding benchmark: 72.5% on SWE-bench.
body: Thats higher than GPT-4.5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and every open-source model. Anthropic has been quietly rewriting the leaderboard.

headline: 3 features that change everything
body: Extended thinking mode lets Claude reason for minutes before answering. Computer use is now production-grade. And the new agent SDK? Zero-setup deploys.

headline: $20/month for Pro. Same price.
body: They didnt raise prices. They shipped the best model in the world at the same cost. That is the real flex.

headline: Context window: 200K tokens
body: Upload an entire codebase. A book. 50 research papers. Claude reads all of it without forgetting the first paragraph.

headline: Why this matters now.
body: OpenAI is focused on consumer. Google is focused on ads. Anthropic is the only company building something developers actually want to use.

headline: The quietest product launch of 2026
body: No keynote. No hype video. Just a blog post and a model that works. This is how dominance looks when youre not paying attention.

sub: AI drops, no noise. Terminal-first. Every day.
